name: Centerline Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Centerline Pickleball Club in Warwick, RI! There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. Reservations are available.

name: City of Warwick Pickleball
description: City of Warwick Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Warwick, RI. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Crompton Playground
description: Crompton Playground is a place to play pickleball in West Warwick, RI. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free.
hours: Mon-Fri 8:30-4:30 Site Map | Accessibility Statement Government Websites by Catalis | Privacy Policy

name: Frenchtown Road
description: Come play pickleball at Frenchtown Road in East Greenwich, RI! There are 5 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Herbert F Paine Memorial Field
description: Come play pickleball at Herbert F Paine Memorial Field in Coventry, RI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Mickey Stevens Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Mickey Stevens Sports Complex in Warwick, RI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Tennis Rhode Island - West Bay Club
description: Tennis Rhode Island - West Bay Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Warwick, RI. There are 6 indoor hard courts.
